\tzpentry{ID3324}{Curvature Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3324 introduces Curvature Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \kappa = \frac{ \| \mathbf{T}' \times \mathbf{T} \|}{ \| \mathbf{T} \|^3}, \quad \tau = \frac{( \mathbf{T} \times \mathbf{T}') \cdot \mathbf{T}''}{ \| \mathbf{T} \times \mathbf{T}' \|^2} \end{equation}
